title: Revamped public status page
description: The public status page has been revamped for a faster, more reliable experience. This page now features a mobile-friendly design with more accurate uptime calculations and correct incident ordering.

title: New filter attributes for asset APIs
description: Release note.

title: Extended Business Rules to Move Ticket and Move Change Forms
description: Freshservice has enhanced business rules to support the Move Ticket and Move Change forms, providing admins with greater control over how items are moved and what information must be filled out or hidden before the move.

title: Audit Logs for Journey Configuration
description: Freshservice now enhances the Audit Logs module to provide admins with greater visibility and control over changes made to Journeys configurations.

title: Enhanced Journey Request Logs and Role-Based Access Controls
description: Freshservice introduces two key enhancements to improve visibility, security, and governance in the Journeys module

title: Journeys Support in the Analytics Module
description: Freshservice now integrates the Journeys module with Analytics, enabling teams to gain actionable, data-driven insights into employee lifecycle processes.

title: Simplify Complex and Repetitive Workflow Automation with Looping
description: Release note.

title: Journeys Sync Between Sandbox and Production
description: Release note.

title: Streamline Workflow Creation and Maintenance with Subflows
description: Release note.

title: Simplified Role Deletion
description: You can now delete roles even if they’re linked to deactivated agents. They’ll automatically be moved to the default agent role based on their agent type.

title: Freddy AI Copilot  - Live Translate (Beta)
description: Improve operational efficiency by translating incoming and outgoing messages, with support available for 40+ languages.

title: Similar tickets under Copilot
description: Make agents productive by providing relevant suggestions for past tickets, which can help resolve the existing ticket much faster

title: Email Sync Control Improvements
description: With this functionality, When connecting your new email account to Freshdesk, emails will now remain unread in your inbox by default.

title: New Time & Assignment Metrics
description: We’ve added 18 new metrics to give deeper visibility into ticket handling. These include First Response, Resolution, Agent/Group Assignment, and Reassignment times (in both business and calendar hours, including reopened scenarios), along with Interaction Time and Resolution Action By.

title: Preview and insert articles with split-screen view
description: The ticket reply experience has been enhanced with a new collapsible split view that displays the solution article list with a full article preview.

title: Controlled rollout of Freddy AI Agent on support portals
description: Freshservice admins can now enable Freddy AI Agent on specific support portals for a targeted set of requesters, allowing them to evaluate the experience before a broader launch.

title: View SharePoint information insights
description: Freshservice now allows admins to gain visibility into SharePoint sync activity and diagnose issues more effectively.

title: Filter for suppressed alerts
description: Freshservice now offers a dedicated filter for suppression status on the Alerts list page.

assets.linkTitle: Alert Management in Freshservice - An Overview

title: Audit logs for email settings and mailboxes
description: The Audit Logs module in Freshservice now provides admins with greater visibility and control over changes made to Email Settings and Mailboxes configurations

title: Clone Journey configurations for faster setup
description: Admins can now clone any existing Journey configuration with a single click.

title: Manual updates retained in Journey Requests
description: Manual updates to the assignee or due date made from the Journey Request details view will now always be honored, even if the Initiator form is updated later with different values.

title: Link tickets to their parent Journey Requests
description: When a ticket is created from a Journey Request, Freshservice automatically adds the parent Journey Request to the ticket’s Associations tab.

title: Preserve cancelled activities for complete journey history
description: Freshservice now preserves cancelled Activities and marks their underlying Tasks as completed, ensuring a complete and auditable history of every Journey.

title: Microsoft Teams Servicebot for MSPs
description: The Servicebot for Microsoft Teams integration enables agents and contacts to manage tickets and collaborate directly within Microsoft Teams.

title: Introducing Timesheet and approvals
description: With the new Timesheet Management, agents record time on tickets and submit weekly timesheets for manager approval, while admins configure how time tracking behaves

title: Introducing Orchestration Apps for Clients
description: Orchestration capabilities enable admins to automate actions on third-party apps across clients. The Orchestration apps will be available starting 6th January 2026.

title: Preview and insert articles faster with split-screen mode
description: The ticket reply experience has been enhanced with a new collapsible split view that displays the solution article list with a full article preview.

title: Clone Journey configurations for faster setup
description: Admins can now clone any existing Journey configuration with a single click

title: Manual updates retained in Journey Requests
description: Manual updates to the assignee or due date made from the Journey Request details view will now always be honored,

title: Link tickets to their parent Journey Requests
description: When a ticket is created from a Journey Request, Freshservice for Business Teams automatically adds the parent Journey Request to the ticket’s Associations tab.

title: Preserve cancelled activities for complete journey history
description: Freshservice for Business Teams now preserves cancelled Activities and marks their underlying Tasks as completed, ensuring a complete and auditable history of every Journey.

title: Transform AI Agents with Powerful API Actions
description: The Actions Library feature provides a centralised place for creating, editing, and managing app actions, custom API actions, and authentications.

title: Unified Auth Presets
description: A new shared authentication library that lets teams reuse header profiles across custom API actions, cutting setup time and keeping configurations consistent from a single, central hub.

title: Smarter Decisions with Proactive, AI-driven Insights
description: Freddy AI Insights provides leaders with Proactive Insights into performance trends, anomalies, and root cause analysis, enabling them to act before customer impact occurs.

title: Freddy AI Copilot  - Live Translate (Beta)
description: Improve operational efficiency by translating incoming and outgoing messages, with support available for 40+ languages.

title: Simplified Role Deletion
description: You can now delete roles even if they are linked to deactivated agents.

title: Similar tickets under Copilot
description: Make agents productive by providing relevant suggestions for past tickets

title: Email Sync Control Improvements
description: When you connect your new email account to Freshdesk, emails will now remain unread in your inbox by default.

title: New Time & Assignment Metrics
description: We’ve added 18 new metrics to give deeper visibility into ticket handling.

title: Precise 24-hour SLA Mapping
description: When creating or updating SLA policies via the Public API, 86,400 seconds now correctly maps to 24 hours instead of 1 day

title: Updated Reply Action
description: The automation action "Send email to requestor" is now called "Send reply".

title: Stronger Automation Continuity
description: With the new automation action "Trigger API", an API response can be processed using JavaScript before subsequent automations execute.

title: Contact improvements
description: You can now see associated emails and companies at a glance in the Contact List and navigate to linked companies directly from a ticket’s Contact Info.

title: Introducing new date picker filter
description: We’ve introduced an advanced date picker filter designed to enhance the user experience and address existing accessibility concerns.

title: Introducing Vertical AI Agents
description: Vertical AI Agents are industry-specific AI Agents for eCommerce, Travel, Logistics, and Fintech, each optimized with domain-specific workflows and integrations.

title: Transform AI Agents with Powerful API Actions
description: Transform AI Agents with Powerful API Actions The Actions Library feature provides a centralised place for creating, editing and managing app actions, custom API actions, and authentications.

title: Unified Auth Presets
description: A new shared authentication library that lets teams reuse header profiles across custom API actions, cutting setup time and keeping configurations consistent from a single, central hub.

title: Easier Workflow Deletion
description: Admins can now remove workflows directly from the Workflow Library.

title: New Freshdesk Omni Course
description: A quick run through on all things FD Omni that will familarise you to what is new and what has changed

title: Shopify app installation for Freshdesk
description: Currently, installing the Shopify app for Freshdesk requires creating a custom app via the Shopify Admin settings. Shopify has announced that this approach will be deprecated. Going forward, custom apps can no longer be created from the Admin page and must instead be created through the Shopify Developer Dashboard. This change will take effect on January 1, 2026.

title: Auto Time Format – ms Precision
description: Default auto time format in Analytics now supports millisecond (ms) precision and displays units in chart axes and export headers, improving clarity for sub-second time metrics.

title: Auto Time Format – ms Precision
description: Default auto time format in Analytics now supports millisecond (ms) precision and displays units in chart axes and export headers, improving clarity for sub-second time metrics.

title: Efficient task management using business rules
description: Introducing Business Rules for Tasks, designed to simplify the agent experience by giving administrators greater control over task forms and visibility

title: Secure deletion for restricted workspaces
description: Deleting a restricted workspace now requires approval from the workspace manager when the action is initiated by a play-god admin who is not a workspace manager for that workspace.

title: Manage alerts for incidents
description: You can now associate and disassociate alerts with Freshservice incidents, giving your operations teams greater flexibility and control, reducing noise and accelerating mean time to resolution.

assets.linkTitle: Alert Management in Freshservice - An Overview

title: PIR publishing and distribution
description: You can now share a published Post Incident Reports (PIR) directly from Freshservice with individual agents and requesters, and revoke the access anytime

title: Freshservice status pages enhancements
description: Audience-specific status pages, Publishable services identification using API , Public status page service display enhancements

title: Auto-save generated documents to SharePoint
description: Freshservice streamlines the document lifecycle by automatically routing generated files to SharePoint folders configured directly within document templates.

title: Automated ticket assignment for agent groups
description: Freshservice now supports intelligent ticket assignment by linking assignment policies directly to agent groups

assets.linkTitle: Ticket Assignment with the New Policy Framework : Freshservice Support

title: Rich text editor for Journey emails
description: Freshservice introduces a rich text email editor for Journey activities, enabling teams to create clear and professional communications.

title: Enhanced global search and dashboards
description: Global Search now supports Ticket, Problem, Change, and Release (TPCR) tasks. This update allows users to search for specific tasks and view results in a dedicated Tasks tab.

title: Enhanced auto time format (ms) precision in analytics
description: Default auto time format in Analytics now supports millisecond (ms) precision and displays units in chart axes and export headers, improving clarity for sub-second time metrics.

title: Move problems between workspaces via business rules
description: Admins can now use business rules to control when and how agents move problems across workspaces.

title: Real-time article collaboration
description: This update introduces real-time collaboration indicators within the knowledge base. Agents can now see when other users are editing the same article, helping to prevent simultaneous edits and unintentional overwrites.

assets.linkTitle: Manage knowledge base articles for service desk : Freshservice Support

title: Clone knowledge base articles
description: Freshservice now supports single-article cloning for knowledge base articles.

assets.linkTitle: Manage knowledge base articles for service desk : Freshservice Support

title: Introducing Dropbox Sign for e-signatures
description: Freshservice now supports Dropbox Sign as an e-signature provider, allowing you to send documents for signature directly from tickets.

assets.linkTitle: Dropbox Sign for e-signatures in documents : Freshservice Support

title: E-sign status and document access on mobile
description: Agents and requesters can now track e-signature progress and access signed documents directly through the Ticket Detail screen on the mobile app.

title: Business rules for tasks on mobile
description: Business rules configured for tasks in the Freshservice web application now apply to the mobile app to ensure consistent behavior across platforms.

title: Major incident promotion and demotion on mobile
description: Agents can now promote tickets to major incidents or demote them to standard incidents directly from the mobile app, ensuring immediate alignment with critical workflows.

title: On-call shift notifications on mobile
description: On-call agents now receive push notifications for upcoming shift starts and shift delegations directly on their mobile devices.

title: Rails framework upgrade
description: Freshservice will undergo a major upgrade to its core backend framework, moving from Rails 6.1 to Rails 7.0. This upgrade brings performance improvements, stronger security defaults, and a more modern foundation for future development, helping ensure long-term maintainability.

title: Enhanced global search and dashboards
description: Global search now supports ticketing tasks to improve visibility across the platform. The Tasks tab in search results allows users to find specific tasks and view their linked parent entities.

title: Real-time article collaboration
description: This update introduces real-time collaboration indicators within the knowledge base. Agents can now see when other users are editing the same article, helping to prevent simultaneous edits and unintentional overwrites.

assets.linkTitle: Manage knowledge base articles for service desk : Freshservice Support

title: Clone knowledge base articles
description: Freshservice now supports single-article cloning for knowledge base articles. Agents can duplicate an individual solution article using the Clone option on the article details page.

assets.linkTitle: Manage knowledge base articles for service desk : Freshservice Support

title: Introducing Dropbox Sign for e-signatures
description: Freshservice now supports Dropbox Sign as an e-signature provider, allowing you to send documents for signature directly from tickets.

assets.linkTitle: Dropbox Sign for e-signatures in documents : Freshservice Support

title: E-sign status and document access on mobile
description: This feature is exclusive to accounts using the native Freshservice e-signer; third-party integrations are not supported. Agents and requesters can now track e-signature progress and access signed documents directly through the Ticket Detail screen on the mobile app.

title: Business rules for tasks on mobile
description: Business rules configured for tasks in the Freshservice web application now apply to the mobile app to ensure consistent behavior across platforms

title: Enhanced Contacts and Companies
description: Define unique fields and agent permissions (read-only/hidden). This feature includes bulk contact deletion, filtered list exports, unified social handles, and a streamlined "Quick-add" form for an optimised, consistent agent experience.

assets.linkTitle: Manage your Customer Data Schema : Freshdesk Support

title: Analytics usage limits for Freshdesk reports
description: We are introducing plan-based usage limits on the reporting date range in Freshdesk Analytics.

title: Policy change for Freshdesk Free program
description: Paid customers can no longer downgrade to the Free Program from within the product.

assets.linkTitle: Understanding Freshdesk Pricing, Plans & Subscription Management

title: Optimize digital experience with ControlUp integration
description: Freshservice’s integration with ControlUp brings real-time endpoint and application performance insights into Freshservice, enabling proactive detection and remediation of issues before users report them.

title: Enhanced Task items field properties
description: This update supports an improved user experience for configuring custom field properties in Task items

assets.linkTitle: Customizing the New Ticket form | Freshservice Field Templates

title: Shared fields support for workflows and custom objects
description: Admins can now access shared fields directly across key workflow and custom object configurations without first selecting a parent service item.

title: Idle session timeout notifications
description: The Freshservice logged-in experience is now enhanced to provide better clarity when your session ends due to inactivity.

title: Reorganization of service desk and support portal settings
description: The Admin Settings for your service desk and support portals are now streamlined to help manage these more intuitively. By grouping interrelated features, we’ve eliminated the need to jump between different sections to complete your setup.

title: Update on enhanced global search and dashboards
description: As part of the launch of Enhanced Global Search and Dashboard capabilities for Tasks released in February 2026, Pro and Enterprise accounts in the US datacenter are currently undergoing a backend migration to support these enhancements

title: Enhanced document management and data mapping
description: Agents can now manage service request documents from a centralized repository, where they can search and filter documents by date, template, requester, or custom placeholders.

assets.linkTitle: Manage documents with the centralized list view : Freshservice Support

title: Introducing Adobe Acrobat Sign for e-signatures
description: Freshservice now supports Adobe Acrobat Sign as an e-signature provider, allowing you to send documents for signature directly from tickets.

title: Manage journeys with enhanced dashboards and filters
description: Admins can now track employee transitions more effectively with a new Journey Activities list view and real-time dashboard charts.

title: Attach documents to Journey emails
description: Admins can now attach documents to Journey emails to share important resources during employee milestones.

title: Streamline knowledge base with bulk article cloning
description: We are excited to introduce bulk article cloning, a powerful new feature designed to help knowledge managers and agents scale their content operations.

assets.linkTitle: Manage knowledge base articles for service desk : Freshservice Support

title: Data recovery update for Knowledge Base
description: The Knowledge Base module now provides a much-needed safety net for your support documentation with the new Trash functionality.

assets.linkTitle: Manage knowledge base articles for service desk : Freshservice Support

title: Organize Analytics reports with folder management
description: Analytics now features folder management for custom reports, enabling you to better organize your reports and locate it quickly.

title: Advanced chart types for complex reporting in Analytics
description: Advanced chart types designed to bring depth and clarity to your complex reporting have now been introduced in Freshservice Analytics.

title: Data recency timestamp for Analytics reports
description: Analytics reports now include a data recency timestamp, giving you immediate visibility into how up-to-date the report data is.

title: Configurable time zones for Analytics reports
description: Configurable time zones designed to bring localized clarity to your global data have now been introduced in Freshservice Analytics.

title: Discontinuation of Pivotal Tracker integration
description: The Pivotal Tracker integration in Freshservice will be discontinued, effective March 5, 2026.

title: Discontinuation of Yammer integration
description: The Yammer integration in Freshservice will be discontinued, effective March 5, 2026. This update follows the phasing out of the Yammer app by Microsoft, as the underlying service is no longer supported or functional.

title: Add services across workspaces to your status page
description: Admins can now configure status pages to include services from other workspaces, enabling unified and consistent communication across organizational boundaries.

title: Improved filtering support in Satisfaction Survey reports
description: Under Satisfaction Survey reports, an issue where customers were unable to use the Group By filter has been resolved

title: Enhanced canned response recommendations
description: Canned response suggester based on Similar Tickets is a new model with higher accuracy that replaces manual ML training with the high-performing Similar Tickets Engine

title: Thank You Detector in Collaborator replies
description: Thank You Detector will support collaborator replies, allowing Freddy AI to distinguish courtesy-only responses from real updates in Ticket Update Automations–preventing unnecessary ticket reopenings or alerts.

title: Smarter, Sleeker Help Widget
description: A refreshed web widget with a modern UI will let customers browse knowledge base articles and raise tickets via embedded forms

title: AI Workflows powering actionable context
description: AI Agent Workflows will let you capture information like customer details (and API results) and save it straight into Freshchat/Freshdesk Omni properties

title: Smarter Copilot seat assignment
description: Assign Copilot licenses in one click with pre-computed agent recommendations, ranked by tickets resolved.

title: Changes in the Agent Performance Report
description: We’ve updated the Agent Performance Report (AHT tab) to improve clarity and accuracy.

title: Contact and Company Record Integrity and Duplicate Prevention
description: Ensure data integrity: Mark Mobile, Work phone, and text fields as unique for Contacts and Companies.

title: Business Hours in AI Agent Workflows
description: Business hours from Freshchat and Freshdesk Omni are now supported in AI Agent Workflows, helping admins design workflows and handoffs that align with operating hours.

title: Fetch Ticket Attachment Names
description: This feature leverages the Freshdesk Interface API to programmatically identify and retrieve the filenames of all attachments within a ticket response.

title: New date picker
description: An advanced date picker that improves the user experience and resolves accessibility issues

title: Topic support for WebChat
description: The source info field will become available for consumption in ticket filters, ticket details, automations, and workflows.

title: AI Workflows powering actionable context
description: AI Agent Workflows will let you capture information like customer details (and API results) and save it straight into Freshchat/Freshdesk Omni properties

title: Business Hours in AI Agent Workflows
description: Business hours from Freshchat and Freshdesk Omni are now supported in AI Agent Workflows, helping admins design workflows and handoffs that align with operating hours.

title: Automated Time-Based Tagging
description: Manual monitoring of aging tickets is prone to oversight. This automation closes that gap by ensuring that any ticket lingering in the queue is instantly identifiable via tags.

title: Contact and Company Record Integrity and Duplicate Prevention
description: Ensure data integrity: Mark Mobile, Work phone, and text fields as unique for Contacts and Companies.

title: ITAM Unified Product
description: Unified Freshservice Product with Device42 Asset Management integrated

title: Introducing Freshservice ITAM
description: Freshservice ITAM delivers expanded capabilities to manage modern hybrid IT environments. It combines IT Asset Management, Software Asset Management, Business Service Mapping, and IP Address Management to provide unified visibility and control over your infrastructure.

title: Field validations for service catalog items
description: Administrators can now use Regex validation for pattern matching (for specific custom and shared field types), or Custom validation for complex logic (for custom field types only) to configure field validation rules for service catalog items.

title: Re-trigger escalation on agent removal
description: Escalation policies are now re-evaluated when an assigned agent is unassigned from a ticket.

title: Simplify journeys with dynamic form sections
description: Freshservice now allows admins to show or hide form sections based on dropdown selections

title: Automate decision-making with approvals in Journeys
description: Freshservice has introduced native approval support within Journeys, allowing admins to insert critical checkpoints into automated workflows.

title: Enhance workflows with advanced lookup field support
description: Freshservice now supports lookup fields within Journeys, enabling users to access specific object properties, such as email addresses and work location, directly in workflows.

title: Automate service item details with expanded prefill support
description: Freshservice has enhanced the journey builder to support prefill capabilities for all service item field types, including attachments, rich text, and date fields.

title: Automate provisioning with mandatory items in Journeys
description: Admins can now use direct provisioning and mandatory service items to streamline Journeys.

title: Apply business rules to service items in Journeys
description: Journeys now honors the business rules configured within your service catalog, ensuring form tasks behave consistently for every user.

title: Templates gallery optimization for Analytics reports
description: The Templates gallery in Analytics reports is now optimized to improve your workflow.

title: Enhanced table aggregations in Analytics reports
description: Subtotal and Grand Total aggregations with two Group bys will now be available in Summary and Matrix tables for Analytics reports.

title: New "Me" filter for personalized reporting
description: The Agent and Requester name filters in Analytics reporting will now include a ‘Me’ option

title: Configurable Start Day for reports
description: You can now customize the start day of the week for individual reports.

title: Enhanced Knowledge Base with Article Templates
description: Standardize documentation with the new Article Templates feature in the Knowledge Base module.

title: New event triggers in workflow automations
description: To streamline service desk operations, the following four new event triggers have been introduced in workflow automations, which significantly enhance operational efficiency by providing real-time visibility into service level breaches.

title: New Facebook Module: Migration and Enhanced Features
description: We’re moving forward with improvements to our Facebook integration to deliver a better agent and admin experience.

title: Real-Time List View Synchronization in Ticket Details
description: To enhance agent productivity and workflow continuity, Ticket Details now supports real-time synchronization with the active list view.

title: Enhanced Ticket Update Automation for Read-Only Agent Interactions
description: We have enhanced the Ticket Update Automation engine to recognize actions performed by agents with Read-Only permissions.

title: Streamlined Ticket Actions
description: To improve agent efficiency and reduce interface clutter, we’ve prioritized the most essential ticket actions—Reply, Note, Forward, and Close—within the primary action area.

title: Source-Aware Reply Editor
description: To enhance response efficiency and accuracy, the reply editor now dynamically adapts to the ticket’s source channel.

title: Enhanced Ticket Details Experience with Real-Time Updates
description: The Ticket Details page now features a refreshed, modern interface designed to provide a consistent experience across both real-time and non-real-time channels.

title: Real-Time Ticket Navigation from List View
description: To enhance workflow efficiency and context continuity, agents can now move between tickets with real-time synchronization from their current list view.

title: Verified Agent Identity Enforcement
description: To enhance your security posture, we’ve blocked the use of disposable email addresses for agent profiles.

title: Note Limit for Improved Ticket Performance
description: Tickets now support up to 400 notes to maintain optimal performance and manageable conversation threads.

title: Interface API Support for Threads Forwarding
description: We are re-introducing Interface API support for the "From" email address field within the Forwarding section of Ticket Threads

title: Admin-Controlled Ticket List Density
description: We are introducing the ability for Administrators to globally define the number of tickets displayed per page for their agents.

title:
Real-Time List View Synchronization in Ticket Details.      
Enhanced Ticket Update Automation for Read-Only Agent Interactions
Streamlined Ticket Actions
Source-Aware Reply Editor
Enhanced Ticket Details Experience with Real-Time Updates.                                               
Real-Time Ticket Navigation from List View
Verified Agent Identity Enforcement
Note Limit for Improved Ticket Performance
Interface API Support for Threads Forwarding
description: Refer to desk

title: Introducing AI Agent Studio in Freshservice
description: Freshservice is launching AI Agent Studio, a centralized command center designed to build, test, and deploy intelligent AI agents. This studio helps you transform static knowledge and workflows into active service assets that evolve with your business needs.

title: Quantify AI adoption with Freddy AI Copilot impact reports
description: Measure the strategic value of Freddy AI Copilot with new impact reports.

title: New child-parent ticket association
description: Support agents can now link a parent ticket directly from any child ticket. This helps improve seamless ticket association and enhanced relationship tracking.

title: New custom field types for service catalog
description: The following three new custom field types for service catalog items enhance the service request experience by bringing structure, intelligence, and clarity to how information is captured and processed.

title: Ai Agent Studio
description: Freddy AI Agent Studio is a new platform within Freshservice for building, deploying, and managing a workforce of specialized AI agents that don't just answer questions. They take action across your connected systems.

title: Introducing Change Risk Assessment
description: Freshservice Change Management now includes a policy-driven Change Risk Assessment engine that helps teams evaluate change risk consistently using configurable risk profiles.

title: Accelerate leadership decisions with Freddy AI executive insights
description: Empower leadership with Freddy AI's aggregated account-level and workspace-level insights.

title: Unified AI Insights and Analytics experience
description: For Enterprise customers with AI Insights enabled: Analytics and AI Insights now live together under a single AI Insights and Analytics tab. A toggle lets users switch between strategic signals and detailed reports without leaving the screen. For all other customers without AI Insights enabled: The Analytics icon has moved to the top of the left navigation rail for quicker access. Functionality remains the same.

title: Resolve tickets faster with Copilot Resolution Insights
description: Freshservice introduces Resolution Insights, a new Freddy AI Copilot capability that helps agents find root causes faster.

title: Conversational Insights is now generally available
description: Starting May 14, 2026, Conversational Insights is generally available for all Freshservice Enterprise customers.

title: Freshservice - FireHydrant Integration
description: We’ve introduced an integration between Freshservice and FireHydrant to streamline incident management.

title: Alert aggregation enhancements
description: The alert aggregation field limit for Custom Webhook integrations under IT Operations Management > Monitoring Tool Integration has been increased from two to four fields.

title: Auto-save generated documents to Google Drive
description: Freshservice now streamlines the document lifecycle by automatically routing generated files to Google Drive folders configured directly within document templates.

title: Standardizing request fulfillment with agent checklists
description: Freshservice now lets admins build agent checklists to guide consistent, step-by-step fulfillment of service requests.

title: Passkey-based authentication for Freshworks
description: We’ve introduced passkey-based authentication across Freshworks, enabling secure and passwordless sign-in for all users.

title: New trend indicators for base metrics in Analytics
description: You can now view trend changes for base module-level metrics, such as Tickets, Changes, or Problems directly within Freshservice Analytics.

title: Audit logs for Reader node in workflows
description: Audit log coverage for the Reader node is now included for workflow automations.

title: Curated reports folders in Analytics
description: Curated reports in Freshservice Analytics are now grouped together under respective folders, such as IT Service Management, Enterprise Service Management, IT Operations Management, and so on. This

title: Data export enhancements in Analytics
description: We have standardized column names to the English language for new columns in Analytics data export configurations.

title: Support for merged, spam, and deleted tickets in Analytics
description: Enhance your data analysis by including spam, merged, and deleted tickets in your Analytics reports.

title: ID-based filtering in Analytics
description: We’ve transitioned from string-based to ID-based querying for ‘Agent Group Name’ and ‘Service Identifier’ to improve platform performance and reliability in Freshservice Analytics.

title: Improved reports and widgets export in Analytics
description: We’ve streamlined the export process for reports and widgets in Analytics to provide a more intuitive experience.

title:
Introducing AI Agent Studio in Freshservice for Business Teams
Resolve tickets faster with Copilot Resolution Insights
Auto-save generated documents to Google Drive
Standardizing request fulfillment with agent checklists 
New trend indicators for base metrics in Analytics
Curated reports folders in Analytics
Data export enhancements in Analytics
Support for merged, spam, and deleted tickets in Analytics
ID-based filtering in Analytics
Improved reports and widgets export in Analytics
description: Refer to Service May Launches

title: Quick list view with real-time support in the ticket details page
description: Agents can move effortlessly between tickets with real-time updates, with tickets automatically populated from their current list view.

assets.linkTitle: Understand the Ticket Details View | Freshdesk

title: Self-serve auto triage onboarding
description: Businesses can now set up Auto Triage faster with a new self-serve configuration experience designed to simplify onboarding.

title: Introducing dark mode
description: As part of the new DEW design system, we are introducing dark mode. This update provides a sleek, high-contrast interface designed to improve comfort, focus, and usability for support teams, especially during long hours and night shifts.

assets.linkTitle: Get Started with the New Freshdesk Interface

title: Expanded IP restrictions for better security
description: Freshdesk now extends IP restriction support beyond portals to help prevent spam and abuse across real-time channels such as web chat, web forms, and mobile SDKs.

assets.linkTitle: Configure IP restrictions to allow or block access

title: API Key permission for agents
description: Strengthen your security posture by managing API key access at the individual agent level

assets.linkTitle: Add, edit, or delete support agents in Freshdesk

title: Group-Based scoping for collaborators
description: Managing access for collaborators is now more consistent, as we have bridged the gap between agent and collaborator permissions, giving you finer control over who sees what.

description: New Chart Types, Templates/Gallery revamp/Folders for reports
